info.name: Logbook Bulk Tenant & Users API
info.description:
Bulk-create tenants (departments) and users in one request.

Base URL: https://log-dev.expressa.id
Authentication: All requests require `x-api-key` header with the LOGBOOK_API_KEY value.

request.description:
Bulk-create a tenant (department) and multiple users in one request.

- Tenant is upserted by portalTenantId (created or updated)
- Each user is upserted by ssoUserId (created or updated)
- Partial success: if one user fails, others continue processing
- Skipped users include an error field explaining why

Supported roles: Super Admin, Project Manager, Developer, Programmer, User, Admin

response.name: Success - 200
